query:
INSERT INTO players (userId, name, accuracy, rating, completedCycles, totalPuzzles, totalCorrect, totalTimeMs, deviceId)
SELECT 
  u.id as userId,
  CONCAT('Player-', u.id) as name,
  0 as accuracy,
  1200 as rating,
  0 as completedCycles,
  0 as totalPuzzles,
  0 as totalCorrect,
  0 as totalTimeMs,
  NULL as deviceId
FROM users u
WHERE u.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT userId FROM players WHERE userId IS NOT NULL)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
